<!-- Thanks for contributing! A small checklist: -->

## what

<!-- one-line summary -->

## why

<!-- the failure shape or use case driving this change -->

## test plan

- [ ] `node --test test/` passes
- [ ] manually exercised the change against a running fleet, OR explained
  why that wasn't possible
- [ ] new behaviour has a test (unit if possible)
- [ ] RUNBOOK / README / CHANGELOG updated if user-visible

## screenshots / output

<!-- if dashboard or CLI output changes, paste the before/after -->
